items.headline: sinira ng WSJ Apr 28 OpenAI revenue-miss report ang AI-trade tape
items.diff_narrative: **New: sinira ng WSJ Apr 28 OpenAI revenue-miss report ang AI-trade tape — Oracle ‑4%, AMD ‑3%, Broadcom ‑4%, SoftBank ‑10%; S&P ‑0.49%, Nasdaq ‑0.9%; sumagot ang OpenAI ng "ridiculous"** — Saklaw ng kahapon ang Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind (structural enabler) pero walang katumbas na revenue-side counterweight. Ang Apr 28 WSJ scoop ang **unang material na bitak sa AI-capex-on-faith tape**: bumagal ang ChatGPT growth sa Q4 + hindi naabot ang internal 1B WAU goal; kuwento, nagbabala si Friar sa mga kasamahan na tighten ang compute funding kapag walang re-acceleration. Tinamaan ng pagbagsak ang chip + foundation-lab-coupled na pangalan, at **ang oras bago ang MSFT/GOOGL/AMZN/META prints ngayon at huling FOMC presser ni Powell**. Apr 28 stock close: **S&P 500 7,138.80 (‑0.49%), Nasdaq 24,663.80 (‑0.9%), Dow 49,141.90, Russell 2000 2,755.99 (‑1.15%)** — malinis na reversal ng Apr 27 record close (S&P 7,173.91).

items.headline: Apr 28 CVE quad
items.diff_narrative: **New: Apr 28 CVE quad — Milesight AIOT default-SSL-key (CVE-2026-32644, CVSS 9.8) + Totolink A8000RU 7240/7242/7243 — pinalawak ang Apr 27–28 wave sa 7+ distinct 9.8 CVEs sa loob ng 72h; CISA KEV Apr 28 nagdagdag ng ConnectWise ScreenConnect CVE-2024-1708 + Windows Shell CVE-2026-32202** — Saklaw ng kahapon ang Apr 27 Totolink trio (7153/7154/7156) + nag-iisang Apr 28 7202. Naglalathala ang Apr 28 ng **tatlo pang A8000RU 9.8** (7240/7242/7243) plus **Milesight cameras na nagshi-ship na may default SSL private keys** (CVE-2026-32644, 9.8). Sa parehong araw, sa CISA KEV add: **ConnectWise ScreenConnect CVE-2024-1708** (path traversal, nakadena sa CVE-2024-1709 auth bypass sa loob ng 14+ buwan) + **Windows Shell CVE-2026-32202** (APT28 spoofing exploit mula Disyembre 2025). Federal deadline May 12. **SGLang CVE-2026-5760** patuloy na hindi patched hanggang Apr 29 (10+ araw post-disclosure).

items.headline: Nag-crystallize ang KV-cache compression utility wave
items.diff_narrative: **New: Nag-crystallize ang KV-cache compression utility wave — TurboQuant 6x compression / 8x faster attention sa ICLR 2026 (Apr 23–25); SGLang PR #21419 in-tree + #23134 fused-kernel rewrite (93–105% bf16); NVIDIA kvpress sa Decoding-Press; PolyKV arxiv 2604.24971 (Apr 27); KVTC + PackKV + TriAttention community implementations** — Hindi pa nagsasaklaw ang report kahapon ng KV-cache compression bilang standing topic. **TurboQuant** (Google Research) ay pupunta sa Q2 2026 official Python release; **umiikot na ang community ports** sa MLX, Triton, vLLM, SGLang. **PolyKV** (Apr 27 arxiv): shared asymmetric KV-pool, int8 keys + 3-bit TurboQuant-MSE values via HF DynamicCache. **NVIDIA kvpress** + **KVTC (20x compression)** + **PackKV (15.30x V)** + **TriAttention (10.7x)** ang nagpupuno sa inference-runtime stack. Kasama ito sa Bonsai-8B at Unsloth bilang standing on-device-stack baseline.

items.headline: Corpus2Skill (arxiv 2604.14572, Apr 27)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Corpus2Skill (arxiv 2604.14572, Apr 27) — hierarchical-skill-tree RAG na tinatalo ang dense retrieval / RAPTOR / agentic RAG sa WixQA nang walang vector DB; ipinapako ng arxiv 2604.08224 (Apr 24) "Externalization in LLM Agents" survey ang skills/harness/protocol bilang 2026 design pattern** — Hindi pa nagsaklaw ang kahapon ng Corpus2Skill o ng Externalization survey. Dini-distill ng **Corpus2Skill** ang corpus offline patungo sa navigable skill directory; nagdri-drill ang agent via lalong pinipinong summaries, kinukuha ang dokumento by ID; pinakamataas na quality sa lahat ng metric ng WixQA. Ang **Externalization** survey ay canonical 2026 framing para sa galaw weights → prompts → skills/harness/protocol — kapareho ng arc na nagdadala ng 17-skill repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, AgentCore Managed Harness.

items.headline: Inilunsad ang Novita Sandbox noong Apr 28
items.diff_narrative: **New: Inilunsad ang Novita Sandbox noong Apr 28 — managed NovitaClaw deployments + Sandbox Skills para sa OpenClaw + Hermes-compatible runtimes + persistent-node configs; unang commercial mitigation product na purposely-built para sa OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes** — Saklaw ng kahapon ang Okta-for-AI-Agents GA Apr 30 + Microsoft Zero Trust for AI carry-forward. Ang **Novita Sandbox** ay unang agent-runtime-specific sandbox layer na nakatutok sa ClawHavoc + Cisco-prompt-injection threat-class. Counterpart sa AgentCore microVM isolation pero may kamalayan sa skill-marketplace.

items.headline: Multica v0.2.18 (Apr 27)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Multica v0.2.18 (Apr 27) — pumalit sa v0.2.16 (Apr 24); naglu-launch ang v0.2.18 sa parehong 3-day window ng Novita Sandbox launch at Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind** — Mayroon ang kahapon ng v0.2.16 (Chat V2 + right-click context menus + Autopilot redesign). Ang v0.2.18 (Apr 27) ay susunod na minor sa parehong orchestrator-skills surface; natural na nakatugma sa Novita Sandbox launch bilang open-source, vendor-neutral counterpart.

items.headline: AI Dev 26 SF day-1 sa progreso Apr 28 + day-2 Apr 29
items.diff_narrative: **New: AI Dev 26 SF day-1 sa progreso Apr 28 + day-2 Apr 29 — kompletong speaker lineup (Google DeepMind, Oracle, AMD, Arm, Neo4j, LangChain, LandingAI, Replit, AI21) + tracks sa Agentic AI, Context Engineering, Multimodal AI Apps, AI Governance, Coding-with-AI** — Inilista ng kahapon ang AI Dev 26 SF bilang bukas ngayon. Ngayon, in-progress ang conference sa Pier 48 Mission Bay; ang speaker list na ang importanteng update — **Andrew Ng + Google DeepMind + Oracle + AMD + Arm + Neo4j + LangChain + LandingAI + Replit + AI21** lahat nasa stage. Hands-on workshops sa agentic AI, context engineering, RAG, model evaluation, at AI safety in production.

items.headline: Na-quantify ang ClawHavoc sa 1,184 malicious ClawHub skills + 36% prompt-injection finding ng Cisco sa OpenClaw marketplace
items.diff_narrative: **Continuing: Na-quantify ang ClawHavoc sa 1,184 malicious ClawHub skills + 36% prompt-injection finding ng Cisco sa OpenClaw marketplace** — Tumitigas ang practitioner detail: **analysis ng Antiy Labs + Koi Security** + Kurtz RSAC keynote tungkol sa self-erasing-after-install memory. Ang narrative na sumusuporta sa Apr 28 Novita Sandbox launch at sa standing zero-trust-for-agentic-AI thesis.

items.headline: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 hindi pa rin patched hanggang Apr 29
items.diff_narrative: **Continuing: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 hindi pa rin patched hanggang Apr 29** — Walang upstream fix sa kabila ng maintainer coordination; nagshi-ship pa rin nang exploitable ang v0.5.10. Cross-server copy-paste class sa vLLM CVE-2025-61620 + LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626. Tumitigas ang AI-Infra-KEV thesis ng Future ng kahapon.

items.headline: DeepSeek V4 Pro / V4 Flash (Apr 24) traction Apr 27–29
items.diff_narrative: **Continuing: DeepSeek V4 Pro / V4 Flash (Apr 24) traction Apr 27–29** — Live ang Hugging Face V4-Pro page; 1.6T MoE / 49B active (Pro), 284B / 13B active (Flash); 1M context; unang DeepSeek release na optimized para sa Huawei Ascend chips. Pababa ng Hybrid Attention ang compute sa 27% (Pro) / 10% (Flash) ng V3.2 sa 1M-context. Ang Apr 27 Bloomberg na "Why China's DeepSeek, Qwen and Moonshot Are a Worry for US AI Rivals" ay nag-frame sa Western/Chinese open-weight gap bilang months-to-days.

items.headline: Mag 7 super-week + FOMC Apr 29 (huling kay Powell)
items.diff_narrative: **Continuing: Mag 7 super-week + FOMC Apr 29 (huling kay Powell) — naglalathala ang MSFT/GOOGL/AMZN/META mamayang after close; AAPL Apr 30; ~$700B 2026 aggregated capex; hawak sa 3.50–3.75% ang rates (consensus 100%)** — Apat na pangalan ng Miyerkules + Apple ng Huwebes. Microsoft FY26 Q3 consensus EPS $4.07 / rev $81.4B (guide $80.65–$81.75B; Azure +37–38% cc); Alphabet Q1 EPS $2.63 / rev $106.89B (FY26 capex $175–$185B); Meta EPS $7.51 / rev $55.5B; Amazon EPS $2.11 / rev $177.2B. Magtatapos ang term ni Powell sa May 15.

items.headline: Hermes Agent v0.11.0 + OpenClaw v2026.4.25-beta cadence pagsapit ng Apr 29
items.diff_narrative: **Continuing: Hermes Agent v0.11.0 + OpenClaw v2026.4.25-beta cadence pagsapit ng Apr 29** — Carry-forward; naglu-launch ang Novita Sandbox sa parehong window na may first-class Hermes-compatible runtimes + Sandbox Skills para sa OpenClaw, na nag-ratify sa kanila bilang production-runtime baseline.

items.headline: Anthropic Opus 4.7 + Claude Managed Agents + Claude Cowork sa Bedrock + AgentCore Managed Harness 4-region preview
items.diff_narrative: **Continuing: Anthropic Opus 4.7 + Claude Managed Agents + Claude Cowork sa Bedrock + AgentCore Managed Harness 4-region preview** — Carry-forward sa AI Dev 26 SF day-2. Dominant frame ng conference ang skills/harness/protocol stack.
